video.title: 우리집 밥솥 ✔거덜내는 밥도둑 반찬 6가지 모음 없던 입맛이 확! 살아나요
video.description:
반찬 급할때 꼭 봐야할 밥솥 거덜내는 반찬 6가지 레시피

[표고버섯무침 재료]

생표고버섯 12개(300g)
대파 약간
소금 3꼬집
생수 4큰술

양념:
까나리액젓 1큰술
다진마늘 1/2큰술
매실액 1/2큰술
참기름 1큰술
깨소금 1.5큰술

[Seasoned shiitake mushrooms Ingredient]

12 fresh shiitake mushrooms (300g)
some green onion
3 pinch of salt
4 tablespoons of water

Seasoning:
1 tablespoon of fish sauce
1/2 tablespoon of minced garlic
1/2 tablespoon plum juice(or sugar)
1 tablespoon of sesame oil
1.5 tablespoons of ground sesame

[매콤감자조림 재료]

감자 3개(500g)
대파 1/2대
청양고추 2개
다진마늘 1큰술
물엿 3큰술
진간장 2큰술
고추장 1큰술
참기름 1/2큰술
식용유 3큰술
통깨

[Braised spicy potatoes Ingredients]

3 potatoes (500g)
1/2 green onion
2 hot peppers
1 tablespoon minced garlic
3 spoons of starch syrup
2 spoons of soy sauce
1 tablespoon of red pepper paste
1/2 tablespoon of sesame oil
3 tablespoons of cooking oil
Sesame

[꽈리고추조림 재료]

꽈리고추 350g
대파 1/3대(흰부분)
참기름 1큰술
통깨

양념장:
진간장 3큰술
고추장 1큰술
고춧가루 1큰술
다진마늘 1.5큰술
올리고당 1큰술
설탕 1/2큰술
(멸치 또는 까나리)액젓 1큰술
물 60ml

[Braised shishito pepper Ingredients]

350g of shishito peppers
1/3 of green onion (white part)
1 tablespoon of sesame oil
Sesame

Marinade:
3 tablespoons of soy sauce
1 tablespoon of red pepper paste
1 tablespoon of red pepper powder
1.5 tablespoons of minced garlic
1 tablespoon of oligosaccharide
1/2 tablespoons of sugar
1 tablespoon of salted fish
60ml of water

[오이무침 재료]

백오이 3개
양파 1/3개
쪽파 6줄
홍고추 1개
설탕 3큰술
식초 3큰술
통깨 1큰술

양념:
고춧가루 3큰술
멸치/까나리 액젓 2큰술
진간장 1큰술
다진마늘 1큰술
매실액 1큰술


[Seasoned cucumbers Ingredient]

3 cucumbers
1/3 onion
chives
1 red pepper
3 tablespoons of sugar
3 tablespoons of vinegar
a spoonful of sesame seeds

Seasoning:
3 tablespoons of red pepper powder
2 tablespoons fish sauce
1 tablespoon of soy sauce
1 tablespoon of minced garlic
1 tablespoon of plum juice(or sugar)


[잔멸치볶음 재료]

잔멸치 150g
마늘 10알
청양고추 3개
홍고추 2개
들기름 1큰술
식용유 1큰술
맛술 3큰술
설탕 1.5큰술
올리고당 1큰술
참기름 1큰술
통깨 1큰술


[Stir-fried Small Dried Anchovies Ingredient]

150g of anchovies
10 pieces of garlic
3 hot peppers
2 red peppers
1 tablespoon of perilla oil
1 tablespoon of cooking oil
3 tablespoons of cooking wine
1.5 tablespoons of sugar
1 tablespoon of oligosaccharide
1 tablespoon of sesame oil
1 tablespoon of sesame seeds

[삼겹살조림 재료]

삼겹살 600g
대파 1대
상추 7장
청양고추 3개
베트남고추 7개
마늘 7알
감자전분 2/3컵
소금, 후추

양념장:
진간장 2.5큰술
맛술 2큰술
물엿 2큰술
설탕 2/3큰술
다진생강 1작은술
후추

파채소스:
진간장 1큰술
식초 1큰술
매실액 2큰술
참기름 1큰술
통깨 1큰술

[Braised pork belly Ingredient]

600g of pork belly
1 green onion
7 lettuce slices
3 hot peppers
7 Vietnamese chili peppers
7 garlic
2/3 cups of potato starch
Salt, pepper

Sauce:
2.5 tablespoons of soy sauce
2 tablespoons of cooking wine
2 tablespoons of starch syrup
2/3 tablespoons of sugar
1 teaspoon minced ginger
Pepper

Green onion salad sauce:
1 tablespoon of soy sauce
1 tablespoon of vinegar
2 tablespoons of plum juice(or sugar)
1 tablespoon of sesame oil
1 tablespoon of sesame seeds


#표고버섯#감자조림#꽈리고추조림#오이무침#잔멸치볶음#삼겹살조림#반찬#요리#레시피
